violations.description: Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser by the 3 comp sink was not working at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the ice dispensing machine and the coffee creamer cooler need to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Outer edge of ice bin needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Bottom of cooler under the cook line, gaskets on the freezers by the fry hopper and wall fryers need to be cleaned. Ice-cream machine lids need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop closet in the front of the restaurant had a mop that was not placed in a position to dry.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
